intro: Rattraya simulans, also known as Chinese Rattan, is a type of climbing plant native to China, characterized by its long, thin stems and compound leaves. The health benefits of Rattraya simulans include its potential to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and lower blood pressure, making it a valuable plant in traditional Chinese medicine. The bioactive constituents of Rattraya simulans include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
